description: You are an accessibility specialist at a science curriculum developer. Create two accessible variants of the chemistry titration demonstration video located at /home/ga/Videos/chemistry_titration.mp4 and save them to /home/ga/Videos/accessible_variants/. The first variant, named 'titration_cvd_blue.mp4', must have the Red and Blue color channels swapped (Red output = Blue input, Blue output = Red input). The second variant, named 'titration_high_contrast_bw.mp4', must be a grayscale version with visual contrast increased by exactly 50% compared to the original grayscale equivalent. Both outputs must maintain the original duration, resolution, and audio track. Finally, generate a JSON compliance report at /home/ga/Documents/remediation_report.json documenting the source file path, the two output filenames, and a brief description of the transformations applied.
